run_summary.summary: One new deal opportunity came in today — Iris at Make Wonder INC (same contact as Bedsure) is offering a paid collab for the Wise Block Botanical Series: building block sets inspired by Eastern flora. The original Bedsure sheet set thread had stalled since Liz quoted her rate on Apr 13 with no reply; Iris is now pivoting to this new campaign. The catch: launch window is April 25–30, so this needs a rate reply from Liz TODAY. Cash comp is confirmed but no number was given — Iris asked Liz to send her quotation.

suggestions.message: 🚨 Iris (Make Wonder INC) is waiting on Liz's rate quote for the Wise Block Botanical Series — 1 YouTube/Instagram Video, cash comp, free product. Launch window is April 25–30, which means there's essentially no runway. This needs a reply today with a rate if Liz wants to take it.

deals.next_action: Reply to Iris with rate quote for 1 YouTube/Instagram Video
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Iris (Make Wonder INC — official agency for Wise Block) offered paid collab for Wise Block Botanical Series. Deliverables: 1 YouTube/Instagram Video. Compensation: cash fee (amount TBD, Iris asked for Liz's quotation) + free Botanical Series building block set. URGENT: Launch date Apr 25–30. Product: 4 designs — Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony. Eastern-inspired building block sets, positioned as home décor/relaxation. Same agency contact as the Bedsure sheet set thread — that thread stalled after Liz quoted her rate on Apr 13; Iris is now offering this separate campaign.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: New paid opportunity — Wise Block Botanical Series via Iris/Make Wonder INC. 1 YT/IG Video, cash comp (TBD), launch Apr 25–30. Awaiting Liz's rate reply.
